judge_scores.reasoning: The model correctly states that Brazil surpassed the US in double-dose vaccination coverage and explains the role of public health programs in achieving this result.
The response correctly states that Brazil surpassed the US in double-dose vaccination coverage and provides context about the role of public programs.

The response correctly confirms Brazil surpassed the US in double-dose COVID-19 vaccination coverage and mentions the approximate timeframe (mid-2022), but provides inflated/inaccurate figures (82-85% for Brazil vs the actual ~76.49%) and does not explain the role of SUS/PNI infrastructure in achieving this result.
